name: Angel Hair Pasta with Pimiento
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the pimientos, reserving 1 tablespoon juice. Set aside.
2. Break the pasta into thirds and cook in boiling water in a large saucepan for 30 seconds.
3. Continue cooking until tender but still firm. Drain well and place in a warm serving bowl with the pimientos, reserved juice, cheese, chives, olive oil, and garlic powder.
4. Toss well to coat before serving.
